Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Legacy Chiropractor to get the job done right.

“After tweaking my knee on the Royal Arch trail, Dr. Hart had me back on the trail in half the expected time. She understood exactly how Boulder's terrain impacts recovery and tailored my treatment accordingly. The elevation-specific advice made a real difference.”

Mark T. Sports Injury Recovery
Mar 15, 2025

“As a Boulder midwife, I refer all my clients here. They know exactly how to work with pregnant bodies at altitude. My own pregnancies were so much more comfortable thanks to their care - especially with all the hill walking in our neighborhood.”

Sarah K. Prenatal Chiropractic
Jan 22, 2025

“When I got rear-ended on Canyon Boulevard during that icy spell last winter, Legacy Chiropractor got me moving again. They understood exactly how Boulder's winter driving conditions affect injuries. The team even helped navigate my insurance claim.”

Javier R. Auto Injury Recovery
Nov 30, 2024

“My 8-year-old had chronic ear infections until we started coming here. The gentle adjustments helped his drainage at altitude. Now he's able to keep up with his Boulder Junior Cycling team without issues.”

Lisa M. Pediatric Chiropractic
Feb 18, 2025

“Working at a Boulder tech startup destroyed my posture. After 6 weeks of treatment, I stand taller and breathe easier at this elevation. They even helped set up my home office in my Pearl Street apartment.”

David P. Posture Correction
Oct 5, 2024

“As a competitive climber at the Boulder Rock Club, I rely on Legacy Chiropractor to keep me injury-free. They understand the specific demands of climbing at altitude and have helped me through several finger and shoulder issues.”

Emma S. Sports Injury Recovery
Apr 2, 2025
Legacy Chiropractor

Trusted chiropractic professionals serving Boulder, CO and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
